examples: We can also ask elderly relatives how to best support them spiritually and use our sacrifices as an opportunity to bring us, our community and the world closer.
He has tried to help this child materially and spiritually.
Our whole programme is spiritually oriented but not religious.
Cloud has greatly encouraged me to become my best self, both spiritually and circumstantially.
Dumont "saved my life, both physically and spiritually, " said Ms. Vivier, an English teacher and poet.
